---
title: "DEGgo RNA-seq Report"
author: "DEGgo"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%Y-%m-%d')`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    number_sections: true
    theme: flatly
    self_contained: false
params:
  results: NULL
  sig_deg: NULL
  go_results: NULL
  summary: NULL
  metadata: NULL
  output_dir: NULL
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE
)

`%||%` <- function(x, y) if (is.null(x)) y else x

res <- params$results
results <- res

outdir <- params$output_dir %||% res$output_dir
if (is.null(outdir) || is.na(outdir)) {
  outdir <- getwd()
}
outdir <- normalizePath(outdir, winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE)

md <- params$metadata %||% res$metadata
sig <- params$sig_deg %||% res$sig_deg
go <- params$go_results %||% res$go_results
sumtab <- params$summary %||% res$summary

html_escape <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x <- gsub("&", "&amp;", x, fixed = TRUE)
  x <- gsub("<", "&lt;", x, fixed = TRUE)
  x <- gsub(">", "&gt;", x, fixed = TRUE)
  x <- gsub('"', "&quot;", x, fixed = TRUE)
  x
}

html_card <- function(title, value, subtitle = NULL) {
  cat(
    '<div class="metric-card">',
    '<div class="metric-title">', html_escape(title), '</div>',
    '<div class="metric-value">', html_escape(value), '</div>',
    if (!is.null(subtitle)) {
      paste0('<div class="metric-subtitle">', html_escape(subtitle), '</div>')
    } else {
      ''
    },
    '</div>'
  )
}

section_note <- function(title, text = NULL) {
  if (is.null(text)) {
    text <- title
    title <- "About this section"
  }

  cat(
    '<div class="section-note">',
    '<div class="section-note-title">', html_escape(title), '</div>',
    '<div class="section-note-text">', text, '</div>',
    '</div>'
  )
}

show_table <- function(x, n = 20, caption = NULL) {
  x <- as.data.frame(x, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

  if (!nrow(x)) {
    cat("<p><em>No table content available.</em></p>")
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  if (is.finite(n)) {
    x <- utils::head(x, n)
  }

  print(
    knitr::kable(
      x,
      format = "html",
      row.names = FALSE,
      escape = FALSE,
      caption = caption,
      table.attr = "class='table table-striped table-hover table-condensed'"
    )
  )

  invisible(NULL)
}

safe_list_png <- function(path, pattern = "\\.png$", full.names = TRUE, recursive = FALSE) {
  if (is.null(path) || length(path) == 0 || anyNA(path) || !dir.exists(path[1])) {
    return(character(0))
  }

  list.files(
    path = path[1],
    pattern = pattern,
    full.names = full.names,
    recursive = recursive
  )
}

find_png <- function(path) {
  safe_list_png(
    path = path,
    pattern = "\\.png$",
    full.names = TRUE,
    recursive = TRUE
  )
}

find_first_dir <- function(paths) {
  paths <- paths[!is.na(paths)]
  paths <- paths[dir.exists(paths)]

  if (!length(paths)) {
    return(NA_character_)
  }

  paths[1]
}

get_output_dir <- function(key, candidates) {
  res$output_dirs[[key]] %||% find_first_dir(file.path(outdir, candidates))
}

clean_title <- function(x) {
  x <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(x))
  x <- gsub("_", " ", x)
  x <- gsub("Volcano Plot", "", x, ignore.case = TRUE)
  x <- gsub("GO terms", "", x, ignore.case = TRUE)
  x <- gsub("Heatmap", "", x, ignore.case = TRUE)
  x <- gsub("Sample Correlation", "Sample correlation", x, ignore.case = TRUE)
  x <- gsub("Hierarchical Clustering", "Hierarchical clustering", x, ignore.case = TRUE)
  trimws(x)
}

figure_badge <- function(f) {
  b <- basename(f)

  if (grepl("Correlation|Clustering|QC|Library|Detected", b, ignore.case = TRUE)) return("QC")
  if (grepl("PCA", b, ignore.case = TRUE)) return("PCA")
  if (grepl("Volcano", b, ignore.case = TRUE)) return("Volcano")
  if (grepl("Heatmap", b, ignore.case = TRUE)) return("Heatmap")
  if (grepl("GO", b, ignore.case = TRUE)) return("GO")

  "Figure"
}

html_img_src <- function(f) {
  f <- normalizePath(f, winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)
  out_abs <- normalizePath(outdir, winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)

  sub(
    paste0("^", out_abs, "/?"),
    "",
    f
  )
}

plot_gallery <- function(files, badge = NULL, empty = "No figures found.") {
  files <- files[file.exists(files)]

  if (!length(files)) {
    cat("<p><em>", empty, "</em></p>")
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  cat('<div class="figure-grid">')

  for (f in sort(files)) {
    title <- clean_title(f)
    img_src <- html_img_src(f)
    badge_i <- badge %||% figure_badge(f)

    cat('<div class="figure-card">')
    cat('<div class="figure-header">')
    cat('<span class="figure-badge">', html_escape(badge_i), '</span>')
    cat('<h3>', html_escape(title), '</h3>')
    cat('</div>')

    cat('<a href="', img_src, '" target="_blank">')
    cat('<img class="figure-img" src="', img_src, '" alt="', html_escape(title), '" title="Click to open full-size figure">')
    cat('</a>')

    cat('<div class="figure-footer">')
    cat('<a href="', img_src, '" target="_blank">Open full figure</a>')
    cat('</div>')

    cat('</div>')
  }

  cat('</div>')
  invisible(NULL)
}

describe_output <- function(x) {
  out <- rep("DEGgo output file or folder", length(x))

  out[grepl("results$", x)] <- "Complete differential expression results for all tested genes."
  out[grepl("significant$", x)] <- "Filtered significant DEGs according to selected thresholds."
  out[grepl("GO$", x)] <- "Gene Ontology enrichment tables for each comparison."
  out[grepl("GO_plots$", x)] <- "Visual summaries of enriched biological processes."
  out[grepl("heatmaps$", x)] <- "Heatmaps showing expression patterns of selected DEGs."
  out[grepl("PCA$", x)] <- "Principal component analyses used to assess sample structure."
  out[grepl("volcano$", x)] <- "Volcano plots displaying fold change and statistical significance."
  out[grepl("QC$|qc$", x)] <- "Quality control metrics, sample correlations and clustering."
  out[grepl("reproducibility$", x)] <- "Input summaries, metadata and run parameters required for reproducibility."
  out[grepl("summary\\.tsv$", x)] <- "Global summary of all differential expression comparisons."
  out[grepl("sessionInfo\\.txt$", x)] <- "R session information and package versions."

  out
}
```

<!-- <style> -->
<!-- :root { -->
<!--   --deggo-green: #00876C; -->
<!--   --deggo-green-dark: #005F4B; -->
<!--   --deggo-bg: #F7FAF9; -->
<!--   --deggo-card: #FFFFFF; -->
<!--   --deggo-text: #1F2933; -->
<!--   --deggo-muted: #6B7280; -->
<!--   --deggo-border: #E5E7EB; -->
<!--   --deggo-red: #740001; -->
<!--   --deggo-blue: #6497B1; -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- :root { -->
<!--   --deggo-navy: #002B5C; -->
<!--   --deggo-navy-dark: #001A38; -->
<!--   --deggo-blue: #0057B8; -->
<!--   --deggo-red: #D90000; -->
<!--   --deggo-red-dark: #740001; -->
<!--   --deggo-light: #F8FAFC; -->
<!--   --deggo-card: #FFFFFF; -->
<!--   --deggo-text: #0B1F3A; -->
<!--   --deggo-muted: #5B677A; -->
<!--   --deggo-border: #DCE3EC; -->

<!--   --deggo-bg: #F8FAFC; -->
<!--   --deggo-green: #0057B8; -->
<!--   --deggo-green-dark: #002B5C; -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- body { -->
<!--   font-size: 14px; -->
<!--   background: var(--deggo-bg); -->
<!--   color: var(--deggo-text); -->
<!--   line-height: 1.6; -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- h1, h2, h3 { -->
<!--   font-weight: 750; -->
<!--   color: #111827; -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- h1 { -->
<!--   margin-top: 42px; -->
<!--   border-bottom: 4px solid var(--deggo-green); -->
<!--   padding-bottom: 10px; -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- h2 { -->
<!--   margin-top: 34px; -->
<!--   color: var(--deggo-green-dark); -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- h3 { -->
<!--   margin-top: 22px; -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- a { -->
<!--   color: var(--deggo-green); -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- .section-note { -->
<!--   background: #EEF8F5; -->
<!--   border-left: 5px solid var(--deggo-green); -->
<!--   border-radius: 12px; -->
<!--   padding: 14px 18px; -->
<!--   margin: 14px 0 22px 0; -->
<!--   box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(0,0,0,0.04); -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- .section-note-title { -->
<!--   font-weight: 800; -->
<!--   color: var(--deggo-green-dark); -->
<!--   text-transform: uppercase; -->
<!--   font-size: 12px; -->
<!--   letter-spacing: 0.04em; -->
<!--   margin-bottom: 4px; -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- .section-note-text { -->
<!--   color: #374151; -->
<!--   font-size: 14px; -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- .metric-grid { -->
<!--   display: grid; -->
<!--   grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); -->
<!--   gap: 14px; -->
<!--   margin: 20px 0; -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- .metric-card { -->
<!--   background: var(--deggo-card); -->
<!--   padding: 18px; -->
<!--   border-radius: 16px; -->
<!--   border: 1px solid var(--deggo-border); -->
<!--   box-shadow: 0 8px 26px rgba(0,0,0,0.055); -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- .metric-title { -->
<!--   color: var(--deggo-muted); -->
<!--   font-size: 12px; -->
<!--   font-weight: 800; -->
<!--   text-transform: uppercase; -->
<!--   letter-spacing: 0.04em; -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- .metric-value { -->
<!--   font-size: 26px; -->
<!--   font-weight: 850; -->
<!--   margin-top: 8px; -->
<!--   color: #111827; -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- .metric-subtitle { -->
<!--   color: var(--deggo-muted); -->
<!--   margin-top: 6px; -->
<!--   font-size: 12px; -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- .figure-grid { -->
<!--   display: grid; -->
<!--   grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(360px, 1fr)); -->
<!--   gap: 24px; -->
<!--   margin-top: 20px; -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- .figure-card { -->
<!--   background: var(--deggo-card); -->
<!--   border: 1px solid var(--deggo-border); -->
<!--   border-radius: 18px; -->
<!--   padding: 16px; -->
<!--   box-shadow: 0 8px 28px rgba(0,0,0,0.065); -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- .figure-card:hover { -->
<!--   transform: translateY(-2px); -->
<!--   transition: 0.2s ease; -->
<!--   box-shadow: 0 12px 34px rgba(0,0,0,0.10); -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- .figure-header h3 { -->
<!--   font-size: 16px; -->
<!--   margin: 8px 0 0 0; -->
<!--   line-height: 1.25; -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- .figure-badge { -->
<!--   display: inline-block; -->
<!--   padding: 4px 11px; -->
<!--   border-radius: 999px; -->
<!--   background: var(--deggo-green); -->
<!--   color: white; -->
<!--   font-size: 12px; -->
<!--   font-weight: 800; -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- .figure-img { -->
<!--   width: 100%; -->
<!--   max-height: 650px; -->
<!--   object-fit: contain; -->
<!--   border-radius: 12px; -->
<!--   border: 1px solid #EEF0F2; -->
<!--   background: white; -->
<!--   cursor: zoom-in; -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- .figure-footer { -->
<!--   margin-top: 10px; -->
<!--   font-size: 13px; -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- .figure-footer a { -->
<!--   color: var(--deggo-green); -->
<!--   font-weight: 800; -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- .table, -->
<!-- .dataTable { -->
<!--   background: white; -->
<!--   border-radius: 12px; -->
<!--   overflow: hidden; -->
<!--   box-shadow: 0 5px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.045); -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- table.dataTable thead th { -->
<!--   background: var(--deggo-green) !important; -->
<!--   color: white !important; -->
<!--   border-bottom: none !important; -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- table.dataTable tbody td { -->
<!--   vertical-align: middle; -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- .output-table { -->
<!--   width: 100%; -->
<!--   border-collapse: collapse; -->
<!--   margin-top: 15px; -->
<!--   background: white; -->
<!--   border-radius: 12px; -->
<!--   overflow: hidden; -->
<!--   box-shadow: 0 4px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- .output-table th { -->
<!--   background: var(--deggo-green); -->
<!--   color: white; -->
<!--   text-align: left; -->
<!--   padding: 12px; -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- .output-table td { -->
<!--   padding: 12px; -->
<!--   border-bottom: 1px solid #ececec; -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- pre { -->
<!--   background: #F4FBF8; -->
<!--   color: #111827; -->
<!--   border-left: 5px solid var(--deggo-green); -->
<!--   padding: 16px; -->
<!--   border-radius: 12px; -->
<!--   max-height: 500px; -->
<!--   overflow-y: auto; -->
<!--   font-size: 13px; -->
<!--   line-height: 1.45; -->
<!--   font-family: Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Courier New", monospace; -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- code { -->
<!--   color: var(--deggo-green-dark); -->
<!--   font-weight: 600; -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- @media (max-width: 1100px) { -->
<!--   .figure-grid { -->
<!--     grid-template-columns: 1fr; -->
<!--   } -->

<!--   .metric-grid { -->
<!--     grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); -->
<!--   } -->
<!-- } -->
<!-- </style> -->


<style>
:root {
  --deggo-navy: #002B5C;
  --deggo-navy-dark: #001A38;
  --deggo-blue: #0057B8;
  --deggo-red: #D90000;
  --deggo-red-dark: #740001;

  --deggo-bg: #F8FAFC;
  --deggo-card: #FFFFFF;
  --deggo-text: #0B1F3A;
  --deggo-muted: #5B677A;
  --deggo-border: #DCE3EC;
}

body {
  font-size: 14px;
  background: var(--deggo-bg);
  color: var(--deggo-text);
  line-height: 1.6;
}

h1, h2, h3 {
  font-weight: 750;
  color: var(--deggo-navy-dark);
}

h1 {
  margin-top: 42px;
  border-bottom: 4px solid var(--deggo-navy);
  padding-bottom: 10px;
}

h2 {
  margin-top: 34px;
  color: var(--deggo-navy);
}

h3 {
  margin-top: 22px;
}

a {
  color: var(--deggo-blue);
}

.section-note {
  background: #EEF4FB;
  border-left: 5px solid var(--deggo-blue);
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 14px 18px;
  margin: 14px 0 22px 0;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);
}

.section-note-title {
  font-weight: 800;
  color: var(--deggo-navy);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  font-size: 12px;
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  margin-bottom: 4px;
}

.section-note-text {
  color: #374151;
  font-size: 14px;
}

.metric-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  gap: 14px;
  margin: 20px 0;
}

.metric-card {
  background: var(--deggo-card);
  padding: 18px;
  border-radius: 16px;
  border: 1px solid var(--deggo-border);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 26px rgba(0,0,0,0.055);
}

.metric-title {
  color: var(--deggo-muted);
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 800;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
}

.metric-value {
  font-size: 26px;
  font-weight: 850;
  margin-top: 8px;
  color: var(--deggo-navy-dark);
}

.metric-subtitle {
  color: var(--deggo-muted);
  margin-top: 6px;
  font-size: 12px;
}

.figure-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(360px, 1fr));
  gap: 24px;
  margin-top: 20px;
}

.figure-card {
  background: var(--deggo-card);
  border: 1px solid var(--deggo-border);
  border-radius: 18px;
  padding: 16px;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 28px rgba(0,0,0,0.065);
}

.figure-card:hover {
  transform: translateY(-2px);
  transition: 0.2s ease;
  box-shadow: 0 12px 34px rgba(0,0,0,0.10);
}

.figure-header h3 {
  font-size: 16px;
  margin: 8px 0 0 0;
  line-height: 1.25;
}

.figure-badge {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 4px 11px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: var(--deggo-navy);
  color: white;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.figure-img {
  width: 100%;
  max-height: 650px;
  object-fit: contain;
  border-radius: 12px;
  border: 1px solid #EEF0F2;
  background: white;
  cursor: zoom-in;
}

.figure-footer {
  margin-top: 10px;
  font-size: 13px;
}

.figure-footer a {
  color: var(--deggo-blue);
  font-weight: 800;
}

.table,
.dataTable {
  background: white;
  border-radius: 12px;
  overflow: hidden;
  box-shadow: 0 5px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.045);
}

table.dataTable thead th {
  background: var(--deggo-navy) !important;
  color: white !important;
  border-bottom: none !important;
}

table.dataTable tbody td {
  vertical-align: middle;
}

.output-table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  margin-top: 15px;
  background: white;
  border-radius: 12px;
  overflow: hidden;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
}

.output-table th {
  background: var(--deggo-navy);
  color: white;
  text-align: left;
  padding: 12px;
}

.output-table td {
  padding: 12px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #ECEFF4;
}

pre {
  background: #F3F7FC;
  color: var(--deggo-navy-dark);
  border-left: 5px solid var(--deggo-blue);
  padding: 16px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  max-height: 500px;
  overflow-y: auto;
  font-size: 13px;
  line-height: 1.45;
  font-family: Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Courier New", monospace;
}

code {
  color: var(--deggo-navy);
  font-weight: 600;
}

@media (max-width: 1100px) {
  .figure-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .metric-grid {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
  }
}
</style>

# Overview

```{r overview, results='asis'}
section_note(
  "Report overview",
  "This section summarizes the DEGgo analysis configuration, including the analysis mode, statistical method, organism, package version, and output directory."
)

analysis_mode <- res$run_params$analysis_mode %||% "NA"

analysis_label <- ifelse(
  analysis_mode == "pairwise",
  "pairwise differential expression analyses across multiple experimental groups",
  "a differential expression analysis"
)

cat(
  sprintf(
    "<p>This report summarizes %s performed with <strong>DEGgo</strong>.</p>",
    analysis_label
  )
)

cat('<div class="metric-grid">')
html_card("Analysis mode", analysis_mode)
html_card("Method", res$run_params$method %||% "NA")
html_card("Organism", res$run_params$organism %||% "NA")
html_card("DEGgo version", res$version %||% "development")
cat('</div>')

cat("<p><strong>Output directory:</strong><br>")
cat("<code>", html_escape(outdir), "</code></p>")
```


# Sample metadata

```{r sample-metadata, results='asis'}

section_note(
  "Sample metadata",
  "This section reports the matched sample metadata used for the analysis. Informative metadata variables are automatically summarized."
)

repro_dir <- file.path(outdir, "reproducibility")
metadata_file <- file.path(repro_dir, "clean_matched_metadata.tsv")
input_summary_file <- file.path(repro_dir, "clean_input_summary.tsv")

if (file.exists(input_summary_file)) {
  input_summary <- read.delim(
    input_summary_file,
    sep = "\t",
    header = TRUE,
    check.names = FALSE,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )

  cat("<h3>Input summary</h3>")

  if (all(c("metric", "value") %in% colnames(input_summary))) {
    cat('<div class="metric-grid">')

    for (i in seq_len(nrow(input_summary))) {
      html_card(
        as.character(input_summary$metric[i]),
        as.character(input_summary$value[i])
      )
    }

    cat("</div>")
  } else {
    show_table(input_summary, n = nrow(input_summary))
  }
}

md2 <- NULL

if (file.exists(metadata_file)) {
  md2 <- read.delim(
    metadata_file,
    sep = "\t",
    header = TRUE,
    check.names = FALSE,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
} else if (!is.null(params$metadata)) {
  md2 <- as.data.frame(params$metadata, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
} else if (!is.null(res$metadata)) {
  md2 <- as.data.frame(res$metadata, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
} else if (!is.null(md)) {
  md2 <- as.data.frame(md, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
}

if (!is.null(md2) && nrow(md2) > 0 && ncol(md2) > 0) {

  colnames(md2) <- make.unique(trimws(colnames(md2)))

  if (colnames(md2)[1] %in% c("", "X", "row.names", "Row.names")) {
    colnames(md2)[1] <- "sample"
  }

  keep_cols <- vapply(
    md2,
    function(x) any(!is.na(x) & trimws(as.character(x)) != ""),
    logical(1)
  )

  md2 <- md2[, keep_cols, drop = FALSE]

  if (!"sample" %in% colnames(md2)) {
    rn <- rownames(md2)

    if (is.null(rn) || all(rn == as.character(seq_len(nrow(md2))))) {
      rn <- seq_len(nrow(md2))
    }

    md2 <- cbind(sample = rn, md2)
  }

  rownames(md2) <- NULL
  md2[] <- lapply(md2, as.character)

  ## ------------------------------------------------------
  ## Automatic metadata summary
  ## ------------------------------------------------------
  
  excluded_vars <- c(
    "sample",
    "comparison_group",
    res$run_params$pairwise_contrast_col %||% NULL
  )
  
  summary_vars <- setdiff(names(md2), excluded_vars)

  summary_vars <- summary_vars[
    vapply(
      md2[summary_vars],
      function(x) {
        x <- as.character(x)
        x <- x[!is.na(x) & trimws(x) != ""]

        nlev <- length(unique(x))

        nlev >= 2 &&
          nlev <= max(20, floor(nrow(md2) * 0.8))
      },
      logical(1)
    )
  ]

  cat("<h3>Experimental design summary</h3>")
  
  if (length(summary_vars)) {
    
    meta_summary <- do.call(
      rbind,
      lapply(summary_vars, function(v) {
        
        x <- as.character(md2[[v]])
        x <- x[!is.na(x) & trimws(x) != ""]
        
        tab <- sort(table(x), decreasing = TRUE)
        
        data.frame(
          Variable = v,
          Level = names(tab),
          N = as.integer(tab),
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        )
      })
    )
    
    cat(
      as.character(
        knitr::kable(
          meta_summary,
          format = "html",
          row.names = FALSE,
          align = c("l", "l", "r"),
          #caption = "Metadata summary",
          table.attr = "class='table table-striped table-hover table-condensed output-table'"
        )
      )
    )
    
  } else {
    cat("<p><em>No informative metadata variables detected.</em></p>")
  }
  
  
  ## ------------------------------------------------------
  ## Matched metadata table
  ## ------------------------------------------------------
  
  cat("<h3>Matched metadata</h3>")
  
  cat(
    paste0(
      "<p><strong>",
      nrow(md2),
      "</strong> samples × <strong>",
      ncol(md2),
      "</strong> metadata variables.</p>"
    )
  )
  
  cat("<details>")
  cat("<summary><strong>Show full matched metadata</strong></summary><br>")
  
  cat(
    as.character(
      knitr::kable(
        md2,
        format = "html",
        row.names = FALSE,
        caption = "Matched metadata",
        table.attr = "class='table table-striped table-hover table-condensed output-table'"
      )
    )
  )
  
  cat("</details>")
  
} else {
  cat("<p><em>No metadata table available.</em></p>")
}

```


# Quality control

```{r qc-note, results='asis'}
section_note(
  "Quality control",
  "This section summarizes sample-level quality control, including library size, detected genes, sample correlation, and clustering. These plots help identify outlier samples before interpreting differential expression."
)
```

## Sample quality assessment

```{r qc-gallery, results='asis'}
qc_dir <- get_output_dir(
  "qc",
  c("pairwise_QC", "single_QC", "sample_QC")
)

qc_files <- find_png(qc_dir)
qc_files <- qc_files[
  grepl(
    "Sample_Correlation|Hierarchical_Clustering|QC_Flags|Library_Size|Detected_Genes",
    basename(qc_files)
  )
]

plot_gallery(qc_files, empty = "No QC plots found.")
```

## Principal component analysis (PCA)

```{r pca-gallery, results='asis'}
section_note(
  "Principal component analysis",
  "Principal component analysis is used to visualize global sample structure and assess whether samples separate according to biological or technical variables."
)

pca_dir <- get_output_dir(
  "pca",
  c("pairwise_PCA", "single_PCA", "PCA", "pca")
)

pca_files <- find_png(pca_dir)
plot_gallery(pca_files, badge = "PCA", empty = "No PCA plots found.")
```

# Differential expression summary

```{r de-summary, results='asis'}
section_note(
  "Differential expression summary",
  "This section summarizes the number of differentially expressed genes for each comparison, including total tested genes, significant genes, upregulated genes, and downregulated genes."
)

if (!is.null(sumtab)) {
  s <- as.data.frame(sumtab)

  cat('<div class="metric-grid">')
  html_card("Comparisons", nrow(s))
  html_card("Significant DEGs", format(sum(s$significant, na.rm = TRUE), big.mark = ","))
  html_card("Upregulated", format(sum(s$up, na.rm = TRUE), big.mark = ","))
  html_card("Downregulated", format(sum(s$down, na.rm = TRUE), big.mark = ","))
  cat('</div>')

  show_table(s, n = nrow(s))
} else {
  cat("<p><em>No DEG summary available.</em></p>")
}
```

## DE summary table

```{r analysis-summary}
summary_df <- params$summary %||% results$summary

if (!is.null(summary_df) && nrow(summary_df) > 0) {
  summary_df <- as.data.frame(summary_df)
  summary_df$comparison <- as.character(summary_df$comparison)

  comp_levels <- unique(summary_df$comparison)

  comparison_cols <- grDevices::hcl.colors(
    n = length(comp_levels),
    palette = "Set 3"
  )

  DT::datatable(
    summary_df,
    rownames = FALSE,
    options = list(
      pageLength = 10,
      scrollX = TRUE,
      dom = "tip"
    )
  ) %>%
    DT::formatStyle(
      "comparison",
      backgroundColor = DT::styleEqual(
        levels = comp_levels,
        values = comparison_cols
      ),
      color = "#333333",
      fontWeight = "bold"
    ) %>%
    DT::formatStyle(
      "significant",
      background = DT::styleColorBar(
        summary_df$significant,
        "#DCE3EC"
      ),
      backgroundSize = "98% 88%",
      backgroundRepeat = "no-repeat",
      backgroundPosition = "center"
    ) %>%
    DT::formatStyle(
      "up",
      color = "#740001",
      fontWeight = "bold"
    ) %>%
    DT::formatStyle(
      "down",
      color = "#6497B1",
      fontWeight = "bold"
    )
} else {
  cat("No summary table available.")
}
```

## DE summary plot

```{r de-summary-plot}
if (!is.null(sumtab)) {
  s <- as.data.frame(sumtab)

  if (all(c("comparison", "up", "down") %in% colnames(s))) {
    plot_df <- rbind(
      data.frame(comparison = s$comparison, count = s$up, regulation = "Up"),
      data.frame(comparison = s$comparison, count = s$down, regulation = "Down")
    )

    ggplot2::ggplot(
      plot_df,
      ggplot2::aes(
        x = stats::reorder(comparison, count, FUN = sum),
        y = count,
        fill = regulation
      )
    ) +
      ggplot2::geom_col(width = 0.8) +
      ggplot2::coord_flip() +
      ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(values = c(Up = "#740001", Down = "#6497b1")) +
      ggplot2::labs(x = NULL, y = "Number of DEGs", fill = NULL) +
      ggplot2::theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
      ggplot2::theme(
        legend.position = "top",
        panel.grid.major.y = ggplot2::element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = ggplot2::element_text(size = 10)
      )
  }
}
```

## Volcano plots

```{r volcano-gallery, results='asis'}
section_note(
  "Volcano plots",
  "Volcano plots display the relationship between effect size and statistical significance for each gene in each comparison."
)

volcano_dir <- get_output_dir(
  "volcano",
  c("pairwise_volcano", "single_volcano", "volcano")
)

volcano_files <- find_png(volcano_dir)
plot_gallery(volcano_files, badge = "Volcano", empty = "No volcano plots found.")
```

## Heatmaps

```{r heatmap-gallery, results='asis'}
section_note(
  "Heatmaps",
  "Heatmaps show the expression patterns of selected differentially expressed genes across samples."
)

heatmap_dir <- get_output_dir(
  "heatmaps",
  c("pairwise_heatmaps", "single_heatmaps", "heatmaps")
)

heatmap_files <- find_png(heatmap_dir)
plot_gallery(heatmap_files, badge = "Heatmap", empty = "No heatmaps found.")
```


# Gene Ontology enrichment summary

```{r go-summary, results='asis'}

section_note(
  "Gene Ontology enrichment",
  "This section summarizes the number of enriched GO terms detected for each comparison and regulation direction."
)

go_summary_file <- list.files(
  path = outdir,
  pattern = "merged\\.tsv$",
  recursive = TRUE,
  full.names = TRUE
)

go_merged <- NULL

if (length(go_summary_file) > 0) {

  go_merged <- utils::read.delim(
    go_summary_file[1],
    check.names = FALSE,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )

  cat('<div class="metric-grid">')

  html_card(
    "GO comparisons",
    if ("comparison" %in% colnames(go_merged)) length(unique(go_merged$comparison)) else "NA"
  )

  html_card(
    "Unique GO terms",
    if ("ID" %in% colnames(go_merged)) length(unique(go_merged$ID)) else "NA"
  )

  html_card(
    "Enriched rows",
    format(nrow(go_merged), big.mark = ",")
  )

  html_card(
    "Ontology",
    if ("ONTOLOGY" %in% colnames(go_merged)) {
      paste(unique(go_merged$ONTOLOGY), collapse = ", ")
    } else {
      "BP"
    }
  )

  cat("</div>")

  if (all(c("comparison", "ID") %in% colnames(go_merged))) {

    if (!"Regulation" %in% colnames(go_merged)) {
      go_merged$Regulation <- "All"
    }

    go_summary <- as.data.frame(
      table(
        comparison = go_merged$comparison,
        Regulation = go_merged$Regulation
      ),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )

    colnames(go_summary) <- c(
      "comparison",
      "Regulation",
      "enriched_GO_terms"
    )

    go_summary <- go_summary[go_summary$enriched_GO_terms > 0, , drop = FALSE]

    go_summary$comparison <- as.character(go_summary$comparison)
    go_summary$Regulation <- as.character(go_summary$Regulation)
    go_summary$enriched_GO_terms <- as.integer(go_summary$enriched_GO_terms)

    go_summary <- go_summary[
      order(go_summary$comparison, go_summary$Regulation),
      ,
      drop = FALSE
    ]

    cat("<h3>GO terms per comparison</h3>")

    if (nrow(go_summary) > 0) {

      comp_levels <- unique(go_summary$comparison)

      comparison_cols <- grDevices::hcl.colors(
        n = length(comp_levels),
        palette = "Set 3"
      )

      DT::datatable(
        go_summary,
        rownames = FALSE,
        options = list(
          pageLength = 10,
          scrollX = TRUE,
          dom = "tip"
        )
      ) %>%
        DT::formatStyle(
          "comparison",
          backgroundColor = DT::styleEqual(
            levels = comp_levels,
            values = comparison_cols
          ),
          color = "#333333",
          fontWeight = "bold"
        ) %>%
        DT::formatStyle(
          "Regulation",
          color = DT::styleEqual(
            c("Up", "Down", "All"),
            c("#740001", "#6497b1", "#002B5C")
          ),
          fontWeight = "bold"
        ) %>%
        DT::formatStyle(
          "enriched_GO_terms",
          background = DT::styleColorBar(
            go_summary$enriched_GO_terms,
            "#DCE3EC"
          ),
          backgroundSize = "98% 88%",
          backgroundRepeat = "no-repeat",
          backgroundPosition = "center"
        )

    } else {
      cat("<p><em>No enriched GO terms found after summarization.</em></p>")
    }

  } else {
    cat("<p><em>No comparison or ID column found in merged GO table.</em></p>")
  }

} else {
  cat("<p><em>No merged GO summary file found.</em></p>")
}

```

## GO plots

```{r go-gallery, results='asis'}
go_dir <- get_output_dir(
  "go",
  c("pairwise_GO", "single_GO", "GO", "go")
)

go_files <- find_png(go_dir)
plot_gallery(go_files, badge = "GO", empty = "No GO plots found.")
```

# Output files

```{r output-files, results='asis'}
section_note(
  "Output structure",
  paste(
    "DEGgo automatically organizes results into dedicated folders.",
    "This structure improves reproducibility, downstream exploration,",
    "and sharing with collaborators."
  )
)

output_items <- list.files(
  path = outdir,
  full.names = FALSE,
  recursive = FALSE
)

if (length(output_items) > 0) {
  output_table <- data.frame(
    Folder = output_items,
    Content = describe_output(output_items),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )

  output_table <- output_table[order(output_table$Folder), ]

  knitr::kable(
    output_table,
    format = "html",
    row.names = FALSE,
    align = c("l", "l"),
    caption = "DEGgo output structure",
    table.attr = "class='table table-striped table-hover table-condensed output-table'"
  )
} else {
  cat("<p><em>No output files found.</em></p>")
}
```

# Reproducibility

```{r reproducibility, results='asis'}
section_note(
  "Reproducibility",
  "This section records run parameters and session information to make the analysis traceable and reproducible."
)

repro_dir <- file.path(outdir, "reproducibility")
run_params <- file.path(repro_dir, "run_parameters.tsv")

if (file.exists(run_params)) {
  cat("## Run parameters\n\n")
   knitr::kable(
    read.delim(run_params, stringsAsFactors = FALSE), n = Inf,
    output_table,
    format = "html",
    row.names = FALSE,
    align = c("l", "l"),
    caption = "DEGgo reproducibility",
    table.attr = "class='table table-striped table-hover table-condensed output-table'"
  )
}

session_file <- file.path(outdir, "sessionInfo.txt")

if (file.exists(session_file)) {
  cat("\n\n## Session info\n\n")
  cat("<details><summary>Show session info</summary><pre>")
  cat(html_escape(paste(readLines(session_file), collapse = "\n")))
  cat("</pre></details>")
}
```
